accent_strategy.description: One vermilion warning point held high as the only hard signal in the cold frame.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A cold muted-blue wall leaning over the right side like frozen pressure.

historical_anchor.description: Challenger held as a pale launch witness under January cold and engineering warning.

final.negative_prompt: high detail, texture, noise, photoreal clutter, multiple subjects, complex background, dramatic lighting, motion blur, busy composition, ornate realism, dense foliage detail, complex sky, center-weighted composition, symmetrical layout, multiple bright accents, text, watermark, logo, ui overlay
final.prompt: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved. The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette. Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only. Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral. One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty. Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration. Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges. Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence. Maintain at least 60% negative space with an asymmetrical focal mass. Use no more than 4 colors and only 1 saturated accent. Allow exactly 1 surreal breach and keep everything else coherent. Lighting must remain soft diffuse. Do not include text, logo, ui_artifacts, motion_blur, photoreal_clutter. Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail. Historical anchor: Challenger held as a pale launch witness under January cold and engineering warning.. Historical topic: Cold-weather launch warning. Single surreal breach: The environmental boundary feels physically oppressive, as if the cold has gained structural weight.. Caption safety: keep the top UI band clear at x=0.00-1.00, y=0.00-0.12 and keep critical subject matter out of the subtitle band at x=0.08-0.92, y=0.74-0.96. Hero subject: A pale shuttle stack silhouette held to the left as a vulnerable witness.. Subject archetype: launch_stack. Dominant mass: A cold muted-blue wall leaning over the right side like frozen pressure.. Accent: One vermilion warning point held high as the only hard signal in the cold frame.. Reflection: A restrained reflective base plane that turns the pad into quiet mirrored frost.. Single subject in mind only; no source references are used. Scene intent: Let the cold feel heavier than the shuttle while the launch stack stays recognizably historical and still..

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Let the cold feel heavier than the shuttle while the launch stack stays recognizably historical and still.

reflection_strategy.description: A restrained reflective base plane that turns the pad into quiet mirrored frost.

subject_anchor.description: A pale shuttle stack silhouette held to the left as a vulnerable witness.

surreal_breach.description: The environmental boundary feels physically oppressive, as if the cold has gained structural weight.
